mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM patients p
INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = p.hospital_id
WHERE p.is_active = 1
AND p.hospital_id = #{hospitalId}
AND ( LOWER(p.patient_uid) = LOWER(#{filter.searchText}) OR LOWER(COALESCE(p.phone_number, '')) = LOWER(#{filter.searchText}) OR p.patient_uid ILIKE '%' || #{filter.searchText} || '%' OR p.first_name ILIKE '%' || #{filter.searchText} || '%' OR p.last_name ILIKE '%' || #{filter.searchText} || '%' OR TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(p.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(p.last_name, ''))) ILIKE '%' || #{filter.searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(p.phone_number, '') ILIKE '%' || #{filter.searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(h.name, '') ILIKE '%' || #{filter.searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(h.code, '') ILIKE '%' || #{filter.searchText} || '%' )
AND LOWER(p.patient_uid) = LOWER(#{filter.patientCode})
AND p.first_name ILIKE '%' || #{filter.firstName} || '%'
AND p.last_name ILIKE '%' || #{filter.lastName} || '%'
AND LOWER(COALESCE(p.phone_number, '')) = LOWER(#{filter.phoneNumber})
AND p.gender = #{filter.gender}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM patients WHERE is_active = 1 AND LOWER(patient_uid) = LOWER(#{patientCode})
AND id != #{excludeId}

INSERT INTO pacs_patient_sequences ( hospital_id, sequence_year, last_sequence, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{hospitalId}, #{yearPrefix}, 1, NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (hospital_id, sequence_year) DO UPDATE SET last_sequence = pacs_patient_sequences.last_sequence + 1, modified_at = NOW() RETURNING last_sequence

SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(RIGHT(patient_uid, 7) AS BIGINT)), 0) FROM patients WHERE hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND ( patient_uid ~ ('^' || #{yearPrefix} || 'P[0-9]{7}$') OR patient_uid ~ ('^' || #{yearPrefix} || '-' || #{hospitalToken} || '-P[0-9]{7}$') )

INSERT INTO patients (hospital_id, patient_uid, first_name, last_name, phone_number, gender, date_of_birth, is_active, created) VALUES ( #{hospitalId}, #{request.patientCode}, #{request.firstName}, #{request.lastName}, #{request.phoneNumber}, #{request.gender}, #{request.dateOfBirth}, 1, NOW() ) RETURNING id
mapper.update: UPDATE patients SET patient_uid = COALESCE(#{request.patientCode}, patient_uid), first_name = COALESCE(#{request.firstName}, first_name), last_name = COALESCE(#{request.lastName}, last_name), phone_number = COALESCE(#{request.phoneNumber}, phone_number), gender = COALESCE(#{request.gender}, gender), date_of_birth = COALESCE(#{request.dateOfBirth}, date_of_birth), modified = NOW() WHERE hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND id = #{request.id} AND is_active = 1
